visual: Steps forward in a bow stance while the arms separate diagonally, one hand rising to eye level and the other sweeping down past the hip, repeated left and right.
motion_description: Starting with weight on the back right leg and the torso turned slightly right, the right hand is held near the chest while the left rests near the waist. The left foot steps out and forward, landing heel-to-toe in a slow, deliberate motion. As weight shifts forward to create a bow stance, the torso rotates horizontally to face the front while the arms separate diagonally; the left hand arcs upward and extends forward to chest height, and the right hand sweeps downward to rest beside the right hip.
